title: Vivid MSM — joint, skin & hair support · 90 capsules
tags: Beauty>Body, brand_VIVID HEALTH - VIVID BODY, cat:joints-mobility, cat:skin-hair-nails, cat:sports-nutrition, Conditions>Pain&Inflammation, featured:joints-mobility, gluten-free, Health>Vits&Minerals, proudly-south-african, sa made, Sport>Maintain, sugar-free, vegetarian, range:body
body_html:
The Sulphur Your Joints, Skin and Hair Keep Asking For

MSM (methylsulfonylmethane) is a natural source of sulphur — a building block your body uses for collagen, keratin and healthy connective tissue. Vivid MSM gives you 90 capsules of clean, single-ingredient MSM with nothing else in the capsule.

What It Does

  • Joint comfort support: MSM is one of the most-used nutrients for everyday joint comfort and post-exercise recovery
  • Skin, hair and nail support: sulphur feeds the collagen and keratin your body builds these from
  • Recovery support: often used by active people to support normal recovery after training

Who It's For

  • Anyone whose knees, hips or hands feel their age in winter
  • Active people and weekend athletes supporting recovery
  • Those working on stronger hair and nails from the inside
  • People who want a single honest ingredient, properly dosed — not a proprietary blend

How to Use

Take 1–3 capsules daily with food. Start at 1 and build up — MSM is well tolerated, but your gut appreciates the ramp. Pairs well with Vivid Flexijoint for joints or Vivid Buffered C (vitamin C helps collagen formation).

The honest bit: MSM supports comfort — it doesn't rebuild cartilage, and nothing in a capsule does. If a joint is hot, swollen or keeping you up at night, see a professional first. Not sure? WhatsApp a consultant.

title: Vivid Coenzyme Q10 — cellular energy & heart support · 60 capsules
tags: brand_VIVID HEALTH - VIVID BODY, cat:brain-cognitive, cat:energy-vitality, cat:gut-health, cat:heart-cardiovascular, cat:vitamins-minerals, Conditions>Anti-Ageing, Conditions>Cardio, Conditions>Colesterol, featured:energy-vitality, featured:heart-cardiovascular, gluten-free, Health>Antioxidants, proudly-south-african, sa made, sugar-free, vegetarian, range:body
body_html:
The Spark Plug Your Cells Run On

Coenzyme Q10 sits inside almost every cell you have, helping convert food into usable energy — and levels naturally decline from our thirties onward, faster if you take statins. Vivid Coenzyme Q10 gives you 60 capsules of this well-studied nutrient to support cellular energy, heart health and healthy ageing.

What It Does

  • Cellular energy support: CoQ10 is a key part of the mitochondrial chain that produces ATP — the energy currency your muscles, brain and heart spend all day
  • Heart health maintenance: the heart is one of the most energy-hungry organs, and CoQ10 is concentrated in cardiac tissue
  • Antioxidant protection: helps protect cell membranes from everyday oxidative stress

Who It's For

  • Anyone over 35 noticing their energy isn't what it used to be
  • People taking statin medication (statins lower the body's own CoQ10 production — talk to your doctor or one of our consultants)
  • Those supporting heart and cardiovascular health as part of a broader routine
  • Active people looking after recovery and cellular resilience

How to Use

Take 1 capsule daily with a meal containing some fat — CoQ10 is fat-soluble and absorbs far better with food. Pairs well with Vivid Omega Oil for heart support.

The honest bit: CoQ10 is a maintenance nutrient, not a quick fix — most people assess it over 8–12 weeks. If you're on chronic medication, check with your doctor first, or WhatsApp one of our consultants and we'll talk it through honestly.
